subcodes.first_line: O thou skilled poet! Though yet a child, thou art indeed mature and of full stature, for true maturity and development are attained through faith and certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شاعر ماهر هر چند طفلی ولی راشد و بالغ زیرا بلوغ و رشد بایمان و ایقان و
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @praise and encouragement, @music and singing
